title: PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT - 211info
text: FAMILY SOLUTIONS ASHLAND PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Program offering a range of year-round support for children with severe emotional or behavioral issues with therapy, skills training, and an on-site classroom. 1836 Fremont Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Ages 5-12 who are experiencing serious, long-term emotional and/or behavioral problems and have a recent mental health assessment documenting the presence of a treatable mental health diagnosis. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm. Youth attend the program Monday-Friday 8am-2:15pm. Email (541) 916-4777 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 916-4777 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties Services: Psychiatric Day Treatment * Adolescents Psychiatric Day Treatment * Children Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - OUTPATIENT THERAPY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PROCTOR FOSTER CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FAMILY SOLUTIONS ASHLAND
